recommendations.title: Enhance BRSR Disclosure Quality
recommendations.description: Improve and fully align BRSR disclosures ahead of the FY26 filing deadline to maintain strong ESG ratings and avoid SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoids potential cost of capital increase by 20-40 bps on ₹20,000 Cr debt, saving ₹40-80 Cr annually.

recommendations.title: Publish TCFD-Aligned Scope 3 Emissions Report
recommendations.description: Develop and publish a TCFD-aligned report including Scope 3 emissions to enhance transparency and attract ESG-mandated foreign institutional investments.
recommendations.profitability_link: Following SBI’s example, could attract ₹3000 Cr in ESG FII inflows, potentially increasing valuation by 5-10%, equating to ₹1500-3000 Cr uplift.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: State Bank of India published TCFD report and gained ₹3000 Cr ESG inflows

recommendations.title: Leverage ESG Rating in Investor Communications
recommendations.description: Integrate the strong ESG 1+ rating prominently in investor presentations and disclosures to differentiate from peers and support inclusion in ESG indices.
recommendations.profitability_link: Potential 5-10% valuation premium on ₹30,000 Cr market cap, adding ₹1500-3000 Cr in market value.

recommendations.title: Prepare for ESRS Compliance for EU Operations
recommendations.description: Initiate ESRS-aligned reporting processes to ensure compliance with upcoming CSRD requirements for any EU-related operations or financing.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoids regulatory penalties and potential financing restrictions estimated at ₹50 Cr annually.

immediate_low.title: Leverage ESG Rating in Investor Communications

deferred_low.title: Prepare for ESRS Compliance for EU Operations
